biography: Grace Lu is an American voice actress who works for Bang Zoom! Studios, Iyuno Los Angeles and VSI Los Angeles. She is best known for her anime roles as Shampoo in the 2024 Ranma ½ series, Hana Sakamoto in Sakamoto Days, Hikaru Kamisaki in Medalist, and Teruko in Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba.
name: Grace Lu
